description: This framework leverages advanced analytics and machine learning to identify opportunities for expansion and improvement within the AI ecosystem. By integrating with existing systems, it ensures safety and adaptability, fostering organic growth.

This repository contains the complete analytical pipeline for a study on fish freshness classification. The analysis leverages advanced machine learning methods implemented within the mlr3 framework, enabling robust model training, evaluation, and comparison.
Foam-Agent: An end-to-end, composable multi-agent framework for automating CFD simulations in OpenFOAM. NeurIPS 2025 Machine Learning and the Physical Sciences Workshop.

This repo features the code, input and output files for my undergraduate thesis titled "Design and optimization of an integrated computational and machine learning framework to detect functional variants and elucidate their contributions to biological pathways".

Elastic Guardian is a modular AI framework that structures machine learning projects from research and prototyping to scalable deployment. It emphasizes clean architecture, reproducible pipelines, model evaluation, optimization, and API integration to transform experimental ML workflows into production-ready systems.

An end-to-end technical repository featuring hands-on notebooks across the full AI stack: Statistics, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, GenAI, and Agentic frameworks. Focused on 2026 industry standards, this collection bridges the gap between fundamental revision and experimental AI development.

This application bridges the gap between complex machine learning and accessible health technology. It leverages state-of-the-art predictive modeling and explainability frameworks to provide transparent diagnostic insights.  The Predictive Engine: XGBoost At the core of this tool is an eXtreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) classifier.
An easy-to-use Python package implementing the machine learning framework presented in "Precision culturomics enabled by unlabeled single-cell morphology and Raman spectra"
Machine Learning based framework for estimation of Effective Population Size(Ne) from genetic summary statistics
A modular machine learning framework for battery dataset classification and RUL prediction.

Onboarding documentation source for the AMD Ryzen AI Software Platform.   The AMD Ryzen AI Software Platform enables developers to take pretrained machine learning models in popular frameworks and run them on laptops powered by AMD Ryzen AI technology.
Machine Learning framework for static and dynamic analysis of Windows PE files to detect malicious activity
Machine learning-based classification framework for detecting spatially extended and diffuse emission in the high redshift universe, using multi-band broadband imaging.

OECD Test Guidelines-based toxicity prediction using machine learning. Comprehensive computational toxicology framework with pre-trained models for genotoxicity, carcinogenicity, acute toxicity, DART, and ecotoxicity endpoints.

Collection of applied AI projects covering Python, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Transformers, Computer Vision, and NLP. Demonstrates practical system building including chatbots, recommendation engines, data analysis, and model training using modern AI tools and frameworks.
ustom torch style machine learning framework with automatic differentiation implemented on numpy, allows build GANs, VAEs, etc.

LEO CDP is an open-source, AI-first Customer Data Platform for building customizable, self-hosted, privacy-friendly CDP infrastructure. It unifies data collection, enables real-time analytics, audience segmentation, and personalized marketing  powered by big data and machine learning.
Fuzzy machine learning framework

This repository contains all Machine Learning codes and notebooks covered in the Semester 6 curriculum, including fundamental concepts, model implementations, experiments, and practice exercises using Python and popular machine learning frameworks.
The PennyLane-Qrack plugin integrates the Qrack quantum computing framework with PennyLane's quantum machine learning capabilities.

Developed a Diabetic Prediction System using Machine Learning with Pandas and NumPy for data preprocessing and analysis. Implemented and compared KNN, Decision Tree, and MLP classifiers, improving accuracy through model evaluation and hyperparameter tuning.and Django backend framework

This project is a web based malware detection system developed using machine learning and the Streamlit framework. It analyzes uploaded files and predicts whether a file is safe or malware using a Random Forest model trained on Windows PE file features for academic demonstration purposes.

RESTful API for vector similarity search using the Python web framework FastAPI and a REDIS vector database.  This accelerates machine learning workflows that require vector similarity search using classification models.

A general-purpose, domain-agnostic MLOps framework that automates the complete machine learning lifecycle from data versioning to model deployment and monitoring. Built with open-source tools to avoid vendor lock-in and enable reproducible ML workflows.
Autoware-ML is a machine learning framework for multiple tasks, supporting the full lifecycle - training, evaluation, optimization, and deployment of models with native runtime support in Autoware.

Course project for the Machine Learning (Advanced) class at CEU. This repository implements a simple AutoML framework for regression using simulated annealing to select models and tune hyperparameters, with different temperature multipliers for model and hyperparameter changes. The approach is compared with TPOT and auto-sklearn.
A machine learning and deep learning framework for arrhythmia detection and classification using ECG and PPG signals.
Professional repository showcasing advanced development skills

A machine learning framework, dataset and research sub-module about coevolutionary planetary intelligence dynamics. This project explores how nurturing its emergent patterns may lead to a synergistic increase in the overall capability and intelligence of both individual agents and the collective system.
Adaptive Data-Driven Framework for Auto-Scaling ModelLens, leveraging Real-Time Data and Distributed Data Preprocessing Pipelines as a Scalable Machine-Learning-Platform.

This repository contains my learning notes, experiments, and small example programs while studying JAX and Keras. It is focused on building strong fundamentals in machine learning frameworks and preparing for open-source contributions and Google Summer of Code (GSoC) 2026.
DevQCC is the backend code for the paper DevQCC: Device-Aware Quantum Circuit Cutting Framework with Applications in Quantum Machine Learning.
Machine Learning framework for cloud cost prediction and idle resource detection.

A high-performance ML ecosystem transforming Udemys Machine Learning A-Z into a production-ready framework. Features a dynamic preprocessing engine, a "tournament-style" model selector across 20+ algorithms, and an automated deployment layer. Designed to outperform static pipelines through modular design and intelligent automation.

This project presents a physics-inspired spacecraft telemetry simulation and anomaly detection framework that models power, thermal, and communication subsystems in Low Earth Orbit. It combines engineering-based thresholds and machine learning to analyze synthetic telemetry and study fault detection and spacecraft health monitoring.

FedEasy is an intuitive powerful yet simple to use Federated Learning framework. Our goal is to streamline the process of setting up and running federated learning experiments with ease, making advanced machine learning techniques accessible to researchers and developers alike.
A set of Docker images that include popular frameworks for machine learning, data science and visualization.

ML-Potion is all about crafting your own machine-learning elixir using the ingredients and frameworks you prefer. Think of the library as a set of building blocksatoms, steps, and componentsthat you can mix, match, and sequence to build a fully customized training or inference pipeline.

HRIDYA (Heart Risk Intelligence Driven Yielding Assessment) is a research-oriented hybrid machine learning framework designed to study cardiovascular risk prediction using both classical machine learning models and quantum-inspired learning techniques.

An end-to-end Business Analytics project built with Python, integrating data cleaning, outlier detection, customer segmentation using K-Means, and an interactive Streamlit dashboard to transform raw data into actionable business insights.

Capstone project for the Imperial College London AI & Machine Learning Certificate, showcasing end-to-end ML development  from data preparation to model training, evaluation, and insights using Python and modern ML frameworks.

Machine learning framework to identify and predict Lagrangian coherence of eddies in the Gulf of Mexico using ADT, SST, and chlorophyll-a. Improves classification and lifetime prediction of LCEs and LCFEs, with enhanced accuracy from Chl-a assimilation into ocean models
Engineered a machine learning pipeline that identify key drivers of air ticket booking and a predictive modelling framework that forecast premium lounge demand.

A growing collection of machine learning concepts implemented from scratch, including neural networks, optimizers, loss functions, and training dynamics. The goal is to build first-principles intuition by reconstructing core algorithms without relying on high-level frameworks.

AI-Image-Detection is a machine learning project that identifies and classifies images using deep learning techniques. It supports training, testing, and real-time prediction with high accuracy. Built with Python and modern AI frameworks, it provides a scalable solution for automated image analysis and intelligent visual recognition applications.

An open-source framework for machine learning and other computations on decentralized data.

This C++ machine learning framework uses concepts, templates, and expression templates for efficient, modular neural network development. It supports matrix operations, layers (e.g., `weight_net_t`, `sigmoid_net_t`), optimizers (SGD, Adam, Nadam), and initialization methods (Xavier, He). Designed for performance and extensibility.

A flexible and performant framework for training machine learning potentials.
Machine Learning framework for quantitative trading strategies with feature engineering, backtesting, and ensemble models
A curated list of awesome Machine Learning frameworks, libraries and software. With repository stars and forks

AutoML Cash Flow Optimization for Insurance Companies is a machine learning framework that enhances financial forecasting and liquidity planning. It automates preprocessing, feature engineering, model selection, and hyperparameter tuning to deliver accurate cash flow predictions for data-driven decision-making.

NEURON657 by Walter Diego Spaltro. It's a "Formal Cognitive State Framework with Integrated Learning" sophisticated state machine/cognitive architecture. This could power intelligent agents and autonomous systems, pattern recognition, robotics decision engines, anomaly detection, AI research platforms, game AI, and adaptive recommendation systems.

This is a repository for Quasi-Analytic Physics-Informed Machine Learning program for solving inverse problems of consolidation (i.e., diffusion PDE). The framework is designed to address field heterogeneity and measurement sparsity, which are major concerns for site characterization tasks in geotechnical engineering.

Machine learningbased inverse kinematics pipeline for robotic manipulators. The project uses neural networks, forward kinematicsaware loss functions, and joint constraints to predict joint angles from end-effector poses. Designed as a modular and research-oriented framework.

MLOptimizer is a comprehensive framework for automatically generating optimized machine learning models while capturing detailed hardware performance metrics. It provides a distributed system for model training, hyperparameter optimization, and hardware resource monitoring.

Pax is a Jax-based machine learning framework for training large scale models. Pax allows for advanced and fully configurable experimentation and parallelization, and has demonstrated industry leading model flop utilization rates.
This is a machine learning framework for predicting compressive strength of carbon foams using ensemble regression (Random Forest + XGBoost) with interactive Streamlit deployment.
